explicit_text: My name is Nguyễn Văn Võ, and I was born and raised in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam. Growing up in a family of five in Thu Duc, I had a typical childhood filled with school and video games. After graduating 9th grade, I moved to the United States in 2016 with my family to seek better educational opportunities and start a new life. This move changed everything for me, giving me a fresh start and the chance to build new habits and friendships.

explicit_text: Vietnam is my homeland where I was born and raised, specifically in Ho Chi Minh City. Growing up there, I attended Tam Phu High School and lived in the peaceful Thu Duc district with my family. Life in Vietnam was filled with simple joys like playing video games and spending time with friends, but I eventually left after 9th grade to seek better opportunities abroad. Vietnam will always hold a special place in my heart, and I hope to return one day.

explicit_text: I lived in the Thu Duc district of Ho Chi Minh City, which was a peaceful and quiet place compared to the bustling city around it. My family ran a small business making tofu and soy milk to sell at markets and schools nearby. Thu Duc was where I grew up with my parents and two brothers, and it holds many of my childhood memories before I moved to the United States.

explicit_text: I studied at Tam Phu High School in Vietnam, which was also known as the 'Green School' because it was surrounded by many trees and focused on environmental awareness. It was there that I spent my school years before I dropped out briefly due to my addiction to video games. Despite that, Tam Phu High School was an important part of my early education and personal growth.

explicit_text: I arrived in Minnesota in September 2016, which marked a major turning point in my life. Moving there with my family was both exciting and challenging, as I left behind my friends, bike, and neighborhood in Vietnam. Minnesota became the place where I started fresh, made new friends, and embraced new opportunities for education and personal growth.
